quality.interpretation: Do not repeat as a recommendation; use as cautionary evidence.

edit_plan.note: Aggressively reduce dominance of approach region to discourage loitering.

avoid_next: Solo weight reduction on dense shaping without auxiliary incentives.
recommend_next: Combine weight shifts on dense components with a stagnation penalty and event-based completion bonus to accelerate landing.
applicability_notes: The failed lesson's root cause hypothesis remains valid; the failure was due to insufficient implementation – applying the full combination, along with a new both_contact bonus, should address the task failure.
